incorrects.description: Student selected 30, the lower boundary line instead of the midpoint

steps.text: The bar doesn't stop at 30. Look where the top of the bar ends. It's higher than 30, between 30 and 40.

incorrects.description: Student selected 34, close to correct but not the midpoint

steps.text: The bar ends exactly halfway between 30 and 40. Half of 10 is 5. Count from 30: that's 35, not 34.

incorrects.description: Student selected 40, the upper boundary line instead of the midpoint

steps.text: The bar doesn't reach 40. Look at where the top ends. It's between 30 and 40, right in the middle.

incorrects.description: Student answered incorrectly. System models the correct answer.

params.description: Horizontal guideline draws from top of Team A bar to vertical axis, stopping at 35.

steps.text: Let me show you. The bar ends halfway between 30 and 40. Each interval is 10, so half of 10 is 5. I count from 30: 30 plus 5 equals 35. The bar shows 35 because it ends at the midpoint between those two lines.
